languages.text: Архимилитант Ведка Дунавски верно служила династии до одного судьбоносного варп-перелета, в котором ее жизнь прервало чудовище, проникшее на палубу из-за вуали. Архимилитант пала, отчаянно защищая группу безоружных людей, которые смогли дождаться подкрепления и спасения благодаря жертве зарковчанки.

Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski faithfully served the dynasty until one fateful warp jump in which her life was cut short by a monster that penetrated the deck from beyond the veil. The Arch-Militant died desperately defending a group of unarmed people. The group was able to hang on until reinforcements arrived and were ultimately saved thanks to the Zarkovian woman's sacrifice.
languages.original_text: Архимилитант Ведка Дунавски верно служила династии до одного судьбоносного варп-перелета, в котором ее жизнь прервало чудовище, проникшее на палубу из-за вуали. languages.text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは、運命のワープジャンプで、ベールを超えた怪物に命を奪われた。彼女は無防備な人々を守るために必死に戦った。そのおかげで、援軍が到着するまで生き延び、最終的に救われた。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski faithfully served the dynasty until one fateful warp jump in which her life was cut short by a monster that penetrated the deck from beyond the veil. The Arch-Militant died desperately defending a group of unarmed people. The group was able to hang on until reinforcements arrived and were ultimately saved thanks to the Zarkovian woman's sacrifice.

traits.locale_text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは、運命のワープジャンプで、ベールを超えた怪物に命を奪われた。彼女は無防備な人々を守るために必死に戦った。そのおかげで、援軍が到着するまで生き延び、最終的に救われた。

languages.text: 首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡忠诚地为王朝服役，直到那场命运般的亚空间跳跃——一头撕裂障壁、冲入甲板的怪物终结了她的生命。为保护一群手无寸铁之人，这位首席战士力战而亡。而正是由于这位扎尔科夫之女的牺牲，那群人才能坚持到援军抵达，并最终获救。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski faithfully served the dynasty until one fateful warp jump in which her life was cut short by a monster that penetrated the deck from beyond the veil. The Arch-Militant died desperately defending a group of unarmed people. The group was able to hang on until reinforcements arrived and were ultimately saved thanks to the Zarkovian woman's sacrifice.

traits.locale_text: 首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡忠诚地为王朝服役，直到那场命运般的亚空间跳跃——一头撕裂障壁、冲入甲板的怪物终结了她的生命。为保护一群手无寸铁之人，这位首席战士力战而亡。而正是由于这位扎尔科夫之女的牺牲，那群人才能坚持到援军抵达，并最终获救。

languages.text: L'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski servit fidèlement la dynastie jusqu'à un saut Warp fatidique au cours duquel elle fut tuée par un monstre de l'Immaterium qui s'était introduit à bord du vaisseau. Elle périt en défendant désespérément un groupe de passagers non armés, qui purent survivre jusqu'à l'arrivée de renforts et être sauvés grâce au sacrifice de la Zarkovienne.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski faithfully served the dynasty until one fateful warp jump in which her life was cut short by a monster that penetrated the deck from beyond the veil. The Arch-Militant died desperately defending a group of unarmed people. The group was able to hang on until reinforcements arrived and were ultimately saved thanks to the Zarkovian woman's sacrifice.

traits.locale_text: L'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski servit fidèlement la dynastie jusqu'à un saut Warp fatidique au cours duquel elle fut tuée par un monstre de l'Immaterium qui s'était introduit à bord du vaisseau. Elle périt en défendant désespérément un groupe de passagers non armés, qui purent survivre jusqu'à l'arrivée de renforts et être sauvés grâce au sacrifice de la Zarkovienne.

languages.text: La Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski sirvió fielmente a la dinastía hasta un fatídico salto de disformidad en el que un monstruo de más allá del velo se infiltró en la cubierta y acabó con su vida. La Archimilitante murió defendiendo desesperadamente a un grupo de personas desarmadas. El grupo consiguió resistir hasta la llegada de los refuerzos y, finalmente, se salvó gracias al sacrificio de la zarkoviana.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski faithfully served the dynasty until one fateful warp jump in which her life was cut short by a monster that penetrated the deck from beyond the veil. The Arch-Militant died desperately defending a group of unarmed people. The group was able to hang on until reinforcements arrived and were ultimately saved thanks to the Zarkovian woman's sacrifice.

traits.locale_text: La Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski sirvió fielmente a la dinastía hasta un fatídico salto de disformidad en el que un monstruo de más allá del velo se infiltró en la cubierta y acabó con su vida. La Archimilitante murió defendiendo desesperadamente a un grupo de personas desarmadas. El grupo consiguió resistir hasta la llegada de los refuerzos y, finalmente, se salvó gracias al sacrificio de la zarkoviana.

languages.text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, hayatının perdenin ötesinden güverteye sızan bir canavar tarafından kısa kesildiği o ölümcül öteboyut atlayışına kadar hanedanlığa sadakatle hizmet etti. Başmilitan, bir grup silahsız insanı umutsuzca savunurken öldü. Grup, takviyeler gelene kadar dayanmayı başardı ve sonunda Zarkovlu kadının fedakârlığı sayesinde kurtarıldı.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski faithfully served the dynasty until one fateful warp jump in which her life was cut short by a monster that penetrated the deck from beyond the veil. The Arch-Militant died desperately defending a group of unarmed people. The group was able to hang on until reinforcements arrived and were ultimately saved thanks to the Zarkovian woman's sacrifice.

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, hayatının perdenin ötesinden güverteye sızan bir canavar tarafından kısa kesildiği o ölümcül öteboyut atlayışına kadar hanedanlığa sadakatle hizmet etti. Başmilitan, bir grup silahsız insanı umutsuzca savunurken öldü. Grup, takviyeler gelene kadar dayanmayı başardı ve sonunda Zarkovlu kadının fedakârlığı sayesinde kurtarıldı.

languages.text: Erzmilitantin Vedka Dunawski leistete der Dynastie treue Dienste, bis sie während eines verhängnisvollen Warpsprungs von einem Monster getötet wurde, das jenseits des Schleiers auf ihr Schiff gelauert hatte. Die Erzmilitantin starb, als sie verzweifelt eine Gruppe unbewaffneter Personen verteidigte. Die Gruppe selbst überlebte bis zur Ankunft von Verstärkung und wurde dank des Opfers der Tochter von Zarkov gerettet.
